name: Text
summary: The Text class contains method to manipulate a Text entity object.

methods.name: display_leader?
methods.summary: The display_leader? method returns the status of the leader.
methods.remarks: The display_leader? method returns the status of the leader.

methods.name: has_leader?
methods.summary: The has_leader method is used to determine if the Text object has a leader.
methods.remarks: The has_leader method is used to determine if the Text object has a leader.

methods.name: set_text
methods.summary: The set_text method is used to set the text within a Text object without recording an Undo operation.
methods.remarks: The set_text method is used to set the text within a Text object without recording an Undo operation.

params.name: textstring
params.doc: The string to be set within the Text object.

properties.name: arrow_type
properties.summary: The arrow_type method retrieves the current arrow type used for the leader text.
properties.remarks: The arrow_type method retrieves the current arrow type used for the leader text. Valid arrow types are: Dimension::ARROW_NONE (Deprecated: DimensionArrowNone) Dimension::ARROW_SLASH (Deprecated: DimensionArrowSlash) Dimension::ARROW_DOT (Deprecated: DimensionArrowDot) Dimension::ARROW_CLOSED (Deprecated: DimensionArrowClosed) Dimension::ARROW_OPEN (Deprecated: DimensionArrowOpen)

properties.name: attached_to
properties.summary: The #attached_to method returns an array of the attached InstancePath object and the Geom::Point3d.
properties.remarks: The #attached_to method returns an array of the attached InstancePath object and the Geom::Point3d.

properties.name: display_leader
properties.summary: The display_leader= method accepts true or false for whether to display the leader.
properties.remarks: The display_leader= method accepts true or false for whether to display the leader. Leader text that is not displayed is set to Hidden type.

properties.name: leader_type
properties.summary: The #leader_type method retrieves the currently set leader type.
properties.remarks: The #leader_type method retrieves the currently set leader type. Valid leaders types are: ALeaderNone ALeaderView ALeaderModel

properties.name: line_weight
properties.summary: The line_weight method returns a line weight in number of pixels.
properties.remarks: The line_weight method returns a line weight in number of pixels. Defalt line weight is 1.

properties.name: point
properties.summary: The point method is used to get the point associated with the text.
properties.remarks: The point method is used to get the point associated with the text.

properties.name: text
properties.summary: The text method is used to retrieve the string version of a Text object.
properties.remarks: The text method is used to retrieve the string version of a Text object.

properties.name: vector
properties.summary: The vector method is used to get the vector associated with the text.
properties.remarks: The vector method is used to get the vector associated with the text.
